title: Parasuram
desc: An investigative journalist plans revenge on an industrialist who killed his family members when his corrupt businesses were exposed.

title: Sakthi Leelai
desc: Sage Bhringi worships only Lord Shiva, Brahma and Vishnu. When Goddess Parvati stands in his way, he goes to the extent of giving rise to a demon.

title: Aboorva Nagam
desc: Annapoorni gives birth to a son who transforms into a snake in the evening. He falls in love with Meenakshi and marries her while she is unaware of his special ability.

title: Enga Chinna Rasa
desc: Chinnarasu, naive boy loves his stepmother dearly and fails to see her evil actions as she takes advantage of him. Later, she plots to kill him for his property.
